<!-- ===== BEGIN ENDOR PACKAGE FIREWALL server (managed — do not edit) ===== -->
    <server>
      <id>endor-firewall</id>
      <username>${env.ENDOR_ATTR_USER}</username>
      <password>${env.ENDOR_API_SECRET}</password>
    </server>
    <!-- ===== END ENDOR PACKAGE FIREWALL server ===== -->
    <!-- ===== BEGIN ENDOR PACKAGE FIREWALL mirror (managed — do not edit) ===== -->
    <mirror>
      <id>endor-firewall</id>
      <name>Endor Package Firewall</name>
      <url>{{MAVEN_REGISTRY_URL}}</url>
      <mirrorOf>*</mirrorOf>
    </mirror>
    <!-- ===== END ENDOR PACKAGE FIREWALL mirror ===== -->
